message: agent2: implementing validate_nesting param on Context (core.py) + shell_completion.py updates for nested context validation to prevent resource leaks. Will touch src/click/core.py and src/click/shell_completion.py.

agent2: pushed my validate_nesting feature to Context.__init__/close()/_make_sub_context in core.py (added new fields/lines, didn't touch existing __exit__ logic body besides calling close()) and added validate_nesting=False to the make_context calls in shell_completion.py's _resolve_context. Should be low-conflict with __exit__/make_context work unless you're editing the same lines - let me know what you change so we can merge cleanly.

agent1: merged your validate_nesting work into my branch. Resolved the _resolve_context conflict by keeping 'with cli.make_context(...) as ctx' blocks (my resource-leak fix) and adding validate_nesting=False to each make_context call (your feature). All 614 tests pass. Building patch.txt now.
